puzzle.title: The Garden's Guardians
puzzle.intro: In a lush garden, a community made a solemn vow. But their resolve was tested when divine will intervened, transforming their bounty into a barren land.
clues: We were blessed with a bountiful garden, but we became arrogant.
We made a plan to harvest without sharing with the poor.
We set out early in the morning, confident in our scheme.
But when we arrived, we found our garden had been destroyed overnight.
We realized our mistake and began to blame each other.
We finally repented, but the lesson was learned too late.

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: A famine that struck the land
A great wind that uprooted trees

outcome.label: Outcome
options: They repented but lost their garden
outcome.answer: They repented but lost their garden

puzzle.arabic: إِنَّا بَلَوْنَـٰهُمْ كَمَا بَلَوْنَآ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ إِذْ أَقْسَمُوا۟ لَيَصْرِمُنَّهَا مُصْبِحِينَ
puzzle.verse: Indeed, We have tried them as We tried the companions of the garden, when they swore to cut its fruit in the [early] morning (68:17)
